tools.name: attempt_completion
tools.description: Signal that the current task is complete and present the final result to the user. MUST be called when all work is done — never end a task with just a text response. The agentic loop stops after this tool is called.

result.description: Final result message summarizing what was accomplished. Be specific about files created, assets modified, and any verification performed.

command.description: Optional CLI command to demonstrate the result (not commonly used in UE context)

tools.name: ask_followup_question
tools.description: Ask the user a question to gather additional information needed to complete the task. Use when you need clarification or more details to proceed. Provide 2-4 suggested answers so the user can pick one quickly.

question.description: A clear, specific question addressing the information you need

follow_up.description: List of 2-4 suggested answers the user can pick from

tools.name: switch_mode
tools.description: Request to switch to a different agent mode. Modes: General (all tools), Blueprint (visual scripting), CppCode (C++ source), Architect (read-only planning), Debug (diagnostics), Asset (materials/meshes).

mode_slug.description: Mode to switch to: general, blueprint, cpp_code, architect, debug, asset

reason.description: Brief explanation for why the mode switch is needed

tools.name: new_task
tools.description: Spawn a child task in a different mode. The parent task pauses until the child completes. Use for delegating specialized work (e.g., delegate C++ work to cpp_code mode).

mode.description: Mode for the child task: general, blueprint, cpp_code, architect, debug, asset

todos.description: Optional markdown checklist for the child task
